\tzpentry{ID3394}{Gyromagnetic Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3394 introduces Gyromagnetic Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \Psi(t) \in T^*(SO(3) \times \mathbb{R}^3) = \{r_{cm}, p_{cm}, g, L_{gyro}, \mu_{eff}, A_{obs}\} $$
